arts.ttl: How Man City's final fixtures compare to Champions League rivals after dramatic Aston Villa win
arts.sum: How Manchester City's remaining Premier League fixture compare to those of their rivals in the race for the Champions League spots.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola revels in Man City masterstroke as Unai Emery left to regret blunder
arts.sum: The Manchester City boss was absolutely delighted after his substitution swung the game in his side's favour, whereas his Unai Emery's switch had the opposite effect

arts.ttl: Matheus Nunes the unlikely hero as Man City take step towards Champions League
arts.sum: The makeshift full-back scored a stoppage-time winner against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Premier League release statement on decision that left Pep Guardiola FUMING with the officials during Man City's clash with Aston Villa
arts.sum: City, in their hunt for a top-five finish and qualification for the Champions League, got off to the perfect start against their opponents, going 1-0 up early on through Bernardo Silva.

arts.ttl: Premier League release VAR statement after controversial Man City penalty
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola was booked after complaining about a penalty being given against Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Aston Villa confirmed lineups: Foden, Grealish, Rashford, Watkins decisions made for crucial Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City and Aston Villa confirm their starting lineups for tonight's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits Man City let 'exceptional' talent go ahead of Aston Villa reunion
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers will come up against his former club Manchester City on Tuesday night as he looks to plot their downfall with Aston Villa in a game that will be crucial for Champions League qualification
